_comment: Stop hook: auto-generate quirks from lessons and push to git on session end
_usage: Copy the Stop entry into your ~/.claude/settings.json hooks section

hooks.command: cd /path/to/your/training-repo && python generate-quirks.py 2>/dev/null; git add quirks/ lessons/ 2>/dev/null; git diff --cached --quiet 2>/dev/null && exit 0; git commit -m "Auto-generate quirks from lessons" 2>/dev/null && git push origin master 2>/dev/null && echo '{"systemMessage": "Quirks auto-generated and pushed to git"}' || true
